name: design-verify
description: UI verification workflow with a responsive-smell linter and screenshot-loop review guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Check UI work for responsive and visual issues.
interface.longDescription: Verify UI changes by rendering and looking. It combines a static responsive-smell linter for mobile-overflow bugs with a screenshot-loop workflow for 375px and 1280px review.
defaultPrompt: Check this UI for responsive smells.
